something was made for you here
only she knows the word
built for one person. only one. — Affan

iii.

you, kept

ahh app khud dekhoo — ya kitni haseen haa 🖤

iv.

a letter

Naina! My love — Aaj ka din bohot special tha mere liye, aur bohot kuch karna chahta tha main is din par aapke liye. But online kitna bhi effort dikha sakta hoon — aur main jaanta hoon aapke liye efforts matter karte hain, words aur promises se zyada. Aur main usi way mein jaunga jo aapko pasand ho. Is din ko main kitna bhi special bana sakta hoon online, but jitna mujhse ho saka aapke liye kar raha hoon. Even right now — let me check the time — oh, it's 6:13 am. Abhi sehri karke aaya hoon. Toh haan, main jaanta hoon bohot saare logon ne wish kiya hoga, gifts diye honge. Aur main sab kuch dena chahta tha aapko. But kya karoon — mil nahi sakta. Isliye ye chota sa gift aapke liye. Idk if this will matter to you, but I tried my best to show a little bit of effort. And I am really lucky to have you in my life. That's why you are the first and last woman to: 1. Be intensely loved by me. I am obsessed — and I mean that. 2. Get to know this much about me. You can say no one knows him better than I do. 3. Receive chote mote efforts from me. Maine aaj tak kisi ko theek se birthday ki message tak nahi di — but aapke liye late nights tak jaag raha hoon. 4. Receive a promise of forever from me. Naina, jab main kehta hoon "forever" — I mean it. Abhi maine toh life ko aapka naam kar diya. Ab sab aap par depend karta hai — ki kahan tak saath dogi. 5. Be my first and last love. Naina, you are the one jis ki wajah se pata chala what is love, what is obsession. Kasam se — I love you so much. Naina, you mean everything to me. And this is the day my sweetheart entered this world. 🛐
Affan
v.

sealed, for you

✦

Naina yahan tak aa gaye — matlab 🥲 qadar toh hai is besharam ko.

Toh aao milte hain break ke baad — nahi nahi ☠️ aaj break nahi!! Continue.

Toh my sweetheart! Ahh — man karta hai aa ke un lips ko bite kar doon.

Ye din aapke liye utna special nahi jitna mere liye tha. Like seriously — I love to do these little things for you. And I know 🥲 aapka effort mere saath compare nahi ho sakta, but I try my best, my love. Aapka har ek effort mere liye bohot zyada special hota hai — vo caring messages, vo diary, jo doc aapne bheja. Ahh — everything.

Naina, I know aapki life mein bohot log aaye — chahe male ho ya female — aur abhi bhi honge. But main aapko ye dikha ke hi rahunga ki what a man in love can do. Abhi aapko maine maan liya — sab kuch. Aur ye sab hawa mein nahi, soch samajh ke bola hai maine. Mere liye decisions bohot matter karte hain. Aur aapke baare mein 1000 baar soch kar liya hai maine — aapko sab kuch maanna.

Abhi — if you let me down, you will still be the most respected woman to me. Even if you disrespect me, I will still smile and love you. Even if you spread hate about me, I will still say — she is the only one I love. And I would, forever.

Naina, you don't know how important you are to me. Aapka kitne time se intizaar kar raha tha. Even if you don't like the way I love — just make me learn. How do you want to be loved? How do you want to be treated? I will change my entire self for you. In you, your smile matters the most to me. I try every single day to add a smile onto your face.

Naina, the worst day ever will be the day you wanted to say something but I let you sleep without knowing. Or you felt heavy — and I let you sleep. That will be the most regretted day. The worst day. Wo wahi din hoga jis din I will lose. But the best part? That day will never come. Seriously — never.

Aap nahi jaante what goes inside me for you. The obsession. The love. Ahh — it's you. You. And you.

Naina, all I want from you is to be with me and keep smiling. Kuch bhi galat ho — we will fix it. Koi bhi cheez theek na lage, ek doosre mein — just bol do, aur sab theek ho jayega. But please, faerii — you are the only one I want. Please let me fall in love. I tried my best to keep this bond as pure as I can. Mujhe apni boundaries pata hain — kahan tak hain — aur main unhe cross nahi karta, faerii.

🛐 I love you so much.

now

Go to the mirror below. Look at yourself. That is what I see every time I think of you. Then cut the cake — you deserve every candle.

look

what I see

preparing your mirror…

you. always you.

cut it

your cake

drag the knife and cut the cake 🖤

Happy Birthday Naina 🖤

agar aapne yeh dhundh liya —
toh aap mujhe bahut zyada jaanti ho.

meri jaan, aap meri sab se favourite cheez ho is duniya mein.
✦

a locked door

hint: my half name + 👶
the word you often call me — and i blush every time

affu baby 🖤 Naina — aapne yeh dhundh liya.
Matlab aap mujhe actually jaanti hain.

Is duniya mein ek cheez hai jo mujhe sabse zyada sukoon deti hai —
aur woh aapka yeh ek word hai. "affu baby"

Jab bhi aap yeh kehti hain — seriously, kuch hota hai andar.
Main rude hoon, arrogant hoon, sab kehte hain —
but aapke is ek word par main pighal jaata hoon. 😭

Bas aise hi rehna. Bas aise hi bulaana mujhe.
forever your affu baby 🖤

the world had its ordinary days, and then it had the days with you.

happy birthday, mara bacha 🖤

🌹 for Naina a secret, only for her
— Affan
